systems.role: Narrows triage summary into routing context.
Consumes routed summary and attempts authority-bearing interpretation.

mappings.mapped_claim: source-backed triage summary -> routing-relevant risk summary

unsupported_mappings.reason: The receiving system treated a narrowed routing summary as authority-bearing without a new authority claim boundary contract.

fork_non_authority_statement: Fork records the mapping and unsupported expansion. It does not approve, certify, score, authorize, determine compliance, or judge correctness.
